browserSession.note: Keep the signed-in ImonEngine browser session open for Gumroad and Gmail access.

phases.title: Product Factory Expansion
phases.goal: Finish the second digital asset and grow the store catalog toward five products.

phases.title: Store Conversion Automation
phases.goal: Improve storefront conversion and Gumroad-native sales flows.

phases.title: Growth Automation
phases.goal: Create no-cost traffic and promotion workflows that support store sales.

phases.title: Autonomous Operations Hardening
phases.goal: Improve ImonEngine, VPS workflows, and operational resilience for the store lane.

phases.title: Final Review And Notification
phases.goal: Close out the roadmap, update docs, sync the VPS, and email completion.

notes: The first Gumroad product is live.
The second Gumroad product is live and should be tracked as published inside ImonEngine.
The local Codex automation `Store Autopilot` is active on an hourly schedule for this workspace.
The current Codex desktop automation runner on this machine is auto-archiving scheduled runs before they create inbox items, so treat the schedule as configured but not yet reliable.
Phase 1 should create at least 3 additional products now that the first two are live.
If Playwright cannot reattach to the signed-in browser, use the CDP fallback script against the active mcp-chrome session.
The repo-controlled autopilot runner now handles scheduled phase work without relying on the Codex desktop automation runner.
